title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 18 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures open lower and go higher, the main contract I2405 closed 798.5. an increase of 0.38%throughout the day; Traders ship according to market conditions; Inquiries from steel mills have decreased, resulting in poor purchasing enthusiasm. PBF at Shandong port dealt 780-805 yuan/mt; increased 10-15 yuan/mt from last Friday.
